div.div:
SUBCONTRACT AGREEMENT
FOR SUPPLY OF MATERIALS AND LABOR COST
(ACP INSTALLATION)
div.p: KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS:
This agreement, made and entered into on on ____________________, in Puerto Princesa City, Philippines, by and between:

TAGUSAO CONSTRUCTION AND TRADING INC./ENGR. LORENZO G. TAN II
FIRST PARTY
- and –
SECOND PARTY
The CONTRACTOR has been awarded a contract to supply materials, labor, tools and supervision for the project "".
NOW THEREFORE, for and in consideration of the mutual promises and covenants contained hereinafter, the parties here agree as follows:
a.) The SECOND PARTY's scope of works shall include but not limited to the following:

t.t-esc: '%s. %s' % ((['I','II','III','IV','V','VI','VII','VIII','IX','X'][subsection_index] if subsection_index < 10 else str(subsection_index + 1)), subsection.get('name') or 'GENERAL')

t.div: I. No subcontracted scope lines found.

div.p: b.) Contract conditions

div.div: a. Materials and Installation must be in accordance to the plans provided and specifications provided as approved by the designer.
b. Framing materials and installation must be standard to maintain the flatness and stiffness of the surface.

c. Supplied Aluminum Composite Panels (ACP), PVDF, 4mm, must conform to approved items by the project's Designer & Construction Management Team. Colors must be conformed from the approved of the designer.
d. Materials & Tools Storage, Power Supply and Scaffold will be provided by the First Party.
e. The First Party shall not be liable for any loss or damage of materials on site caused by the other persons after the delivery to the project site.

div.p: c.) The FIRST PARTY shall pay the SECOND PARTY for full, faithful and complete performance of all of its obligations under this Agreement the sum of PESOS: EIGHT HUNDRED THOUSAND PESOS ONLY (PHP 800,000.00) exclusive of 12% Value Added Tax and 2% Withholding Tax Receipt hereinafter referred to as the "Contract Sum".

In the event that there are changes in the scope of work, either by altering, adding or deducting from works covered herein, the Contract amount shall be adjusted accordingly. No claims for loss of profit or opportunity cost or addition overhead shall be made by the Sub-contractor in case of any reduction in the final Contract Amount.

d.) The SECOND PARTY agree that the construction shall be completed within TWENTY (20) calendar days from the commencement date. This includes upon materials purchasing, delivery and installation works.

div.div: a. Delivery Time: 4 days from the date of DP, for the available stocks.
b. Delivery Time for ACP Panels: maximum of 2 weeks
c. Installation time: 24 hours working day under good weather conditions.

div.p: Liquidated damages per day of delay shall be paid by the Second Party for failure to substantially complete the construction within the time fixed on the Project schedule, given by the formula:
Contract Penalty = 0.1% of the contract cost for every calendar day of delay.

e.) Contract amount shall be paid through progress billing based on actual work accomplished fabricated and installed) for that particular period less pro-rate deduction of ten (10%) percent retention and recoupment of down payment.
Down payment shall be Five Hundred Sixty Thousand Pesos Only (Php 560,000.00) or equivalent to Seventy Percent (70%) of the Total contract Amount amounting to.

Final Payment shall Constitute a waiver of all claims by Second Party relating to Subcontract Work, but shall in no way relieved Second Party of liability for warranties, or for nonconforming or defective work discovered after final payment.
Retention of Ten (10%) percent shall be released one (1) Months upon the completion and turnover of all the works stipulated in this contract and no defects or poor workmanship will be observed.

f.) The Project has a warranty of ONE (1) calendar year upon acceptance for damages caused by poor mater materials and workmanship. Operational wear and tear and force majeure damages are not covered by the warranty.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have affixed their signature, effective on the date first written above, in the City of Puerto Princesa, Palawan, Philippines.
TAGUSAO CONSTRUCTION & TRADING INC.
